text: France will summon Ambassador Charles Kushner over US comments on activist’s death - Politico
fullText: The foreign affairs minister protested a social media post by the State Department that said “reports, corroborated by the French Minister of the Interior, that Quentin Deranque was killed by left-wing militants, should concern us all.”

text: McIlroy finishes one shot behind Genesis winner Bridgeman - BBC

text: Tottenham Hotspur 1-4 Arsenal: Eze, Gyokeres ooze class in North London derby rout - NBC Sports
